name: Google Cloud Functions

naming.description: Standard POSIX. Some FUNCTION_ and GCP_ prefix vars are auto-set.

limits.notes: Max 100 env vars. Keys ≤ 256 chars. Values ≤ 32 KB. Build-time and runtime env vars are separate.

notes: Cloud Functions supports build-time env vars (available during build) and runtime env vars. Use Secret Manager for sensitive data — 2nd gen functions support secret volume mounts.
